creator: kotadr@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 167304
databases/postgresql94-server-1c

PostgreSQL database server with additional patches to work with business
applications platform 1C:Enterprise

This is a revised version of the earlier send port (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=197992), which is built on a standard port postgresql (Palle Girgensohn wishes).
